case_title: ESSA MOHAMED ALAMRI VS. SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION,

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF ESSA MOHAMED ALAMRI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. HONORABLE ERIC GROVER FINDS SERVICE IS PROPER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED.
